findings.issue: BCP ZH definition inconsistent within same page: term leaf uses '不可预测事态' + '汇总' but table cell uses '突发情况' + '归纳'. Same JP source '不測の事態…をまとめた'. Intra-page ZH divergence may confuse learners.
findings.jp_source: 不測の事態を想定して、事業をいかに継続するかをまとめた計画
findings.zh_term: 针对灾害或事故等不可预测事态，汇总如何持续开展业务的计划
findings.zh_table: 针对灾害或事故等突发情况，归纳如何延续业务的计划
findings.recommended_fix: Unify to single ZH rendering, prefer '不可预测事态' + '汇总' to match term definition.

findings.issue: Duplicate section_number '08-05' on two distinct sections: p307 'システム監査/系统审计/System Audit' and p311 '監査人の独立性/审计人员的独立性/Auditor Independence'. Downstream indexing will collide.
findings.recommended_fix: Assign distinct identifiers, e.g., '08-05' and '08-05-01', or sequential '08-05' / '08-06'.

findings.issue: Section p309 uses section_number '09' while all adjacent sections use '08-NN' format. Inconsistent numbering scheme across chunk — likely OCR artifact or pipeline labeling error.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify source and correct to match surrounding '08-NN' scheme.

findings.issue: Spurious mid-sentence capitalization: 'Unauthorized Access' should be 'unauthorized access'. JP '不正アクセス' is a common noun. EN convention: do not capitalize mid-sentence common nouns.
findings.bad_text: ...natural disasters, Unauthorized Access, and acts of destruction
findings.corrected_text: ...natural disasters, unauthorized access, and acts of destruction

findings.issue: Raw METI URLs embedded inline in table cell text across all three languages. Not a translation error — structurally consistent — but may render as raw text in learner UI. Consider moving URLs to a separate 'url_ref' field.

summary: Chunk 29 (pages 302-311) covers Facility Management (ファシリティマネジメント / 设施管理) and System Audit (システム監査 / 系统审计). Page 302 is empty (leaf_count=0). 23 leaf fields audited across 3 lenses (JP->ZH fidelity, JP->EN fidelity, internal consistency). 0 CRITICAL/ERROR findings. 3 WARNings: BCP ZH intra-page inconsistency (F-01), duplicate section_number '08-05' on two sections (F-02), and section_number '09' format outlier (F-03). 1 MINOR: spurious capitalization of 'Unauthorized Access' in EN table cell (F-04). 1 INFO: raw URLs inline in table cells (F-05). No release-impacting defects. Overall verdict: PASS_WITH_WARNINGS.
